title: Add boss_keyword_association model tests
description: Implement light model tests for BossKeywordAssociation presence/validity behavior using self-contained data.

title: Add light boss and boss_keyword model tests
description: Implement focused model tests for Boss and BossKeyword validations and association deletion behavior, including same-name keyword recreation non-reattachment.

title: Validate keyword deletion and boss history behavior
description: Investigate whether deleting a BossKeyword correctly removes join rows without deleting bosses, and whether recreated keywords with same name reattach.

title: Repair stale test fixtures
description: Fixture files in test/fixtures are stale against current schema and break Rails test loading (e.g., boss_keywords uses attributes instead of properties). Update fixtures to match schema and validate by running representative tests.
